subject: A figure in dark fitted leather attire crouches low in a stone corridor, reaching toward a hatch or box set into a stone wall
description: A slim figure wearing dark close-fitting leather gear — including boots, coat, and a blue shoulder detail — kneels low on a stone tile floor in a dim corridor or alcove. One arm reaches toward what appears to be a stone box, panel, or hatch at the base of a wall. The posture is careful and deliberate. Bare stone stairs rise behind the figure. A gnarled tree branch appears in the upper left corner of the scene. The palette is muted grey and dark blue with cool natural light.
foreground: figure in dark leather crouching and reaching toward a hatch in a stone corridor
